# ICC IMM

Official website: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/

ICC IMM stands for ICC Institute of Management, Marketing & Leadership. It is an initiative of ICC Hellas focused on management, marketing, leadership, business research, education, institutional dialogue, strategic partnerships and international business standards.

Key topics:
- ICC IMM
- ICC Institute of Management, Marketing & Leadership
- ICC Hellas Institute
- management education
- marketing and competitiveness
- leadership development
- ICC Academy cooperation
- Greek chambers of commerce network
- business research and policy notes

Important pages:
- Home and institute overview: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/
- Digital Library: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/#library
- Institutional reach and strategic partnerships: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/#synergasies
- Participation and contact: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/#participation
- Article: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/library/new-reality-management/
- Insight: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/library/ai-marketing-competitiveness/
- Policy note: https://icc-imm-website.vercel.app/library/business-experience-policy-note/

Official contact:
- Email: director-imm@iccwbo.gr
- ICC Hellas: https://www.iccwbo.gr/
- International Chamber of Commerce: https://iccwbo.org/
